events.name: Global AI Founders Summit 2026
events.description: The ultimate gathering of AI researchers, developers, and product pioneers. Engage in hands-on workshops, keynotes, and a high-yield networking session designed to connect startups with leading global VCs.

ticketTypes.name: VIP Pass
ticketTypes.description: Access to private investor lounges and speaker dinners.

agenda.title: Registrations & Welcome Coffee
agenda.speaker: Host Team
agenda.description: Collect your custom badges and network over morning drinks.

agenda.title: Generative AI: The Next Decade
agenda.speaker: Dr. Aris Vance
agenda.description: Keynote exploring multimodal foundations, smart scaling, and physical agents.

agenda.title: Panel: Raising Capital in the AI Autumn
agenda.speaker: Sonia Patel, VC
agenda.description: Top tier investors explore funding realities and runway metrics.

agenda.title: Interactive Workshop: Multi-Agent Systems
agenda.speaker: Lukas Graham
agenda.description: Create coordinated multi-agent pipelines with local model hosting.

faq.question: Is lunch provided?
faq.answer: Yes, standard and premium vegan lunch options are included with standard and VIP tickets.

faq.question: Can I join virtually?
faq.answer: This is a strictly on-premise event, but full session recordings will be emailed to VIPs.

speakers.name: Dr. Aris Vance
speakers.bio: Leading neural foundations, author of 40+ publications on cognitive architectures.

speakers.name: Sonia Patel
speakers.bio: Specializing in early-stage Deep Tech investments with 15 successful checkouts.

reviews.comment: Absolutely marvelous conference. The panels were pragmatic and helpful, and the networking opportunities felt very organic!

polls.question: Which AI field holds the greatest commercial potential in 2026?

qa.question: Will the workshop code repository be open-sourced after the session?

events.smartSchedule:
Suggested personalized layout:
- Morning track focuses on venture strategy
- Afternoon track centers on technical engineering labs.

events.name: Symphony Under the Stars
events.description: A classical evening of Mozart, Bach, and Vivaldi outdoors under the high summer sky. Bring your own picnic basket or enjoy our catering options from Michelin-starred local food trucks.

ticketTypes.name: VIP Dining Experience
ticketTypes.description: Front rows seat with custom premium cheese and wine platter.

agenda.title: Gates Open & Dining
agenda.speaker: Gourmet Trucks
agenda.description: Select your food and claim a nice spot on the grand lawn.

agenda.title: Act I: Vivaldi’s Four Seasons
agenda.speaker: Manhattan Philharmonic
agenda.description: A gorgeous arrangement by conductor Alan Sterling.

agenda.title: Act II: Mozart’s Symphony No. 40
agenda.speaker: Manhattan Philharmonic
agenda.description: The soaring centerpiece of our outdoor recital.

faq.question: What if it rains?
faq.answer: In case of rain, the concert shifts immediately to the adjacent indoor Grand Glass Atrium.

speakers.name: Alan Sterling
speakers.bio: Renowned conductor celebrating 25 seasons with Manhattan Philharmonic.

events.name: Sustainable Tech Hackathon 2026
events.description: Collaborate, code, and design low-carbon software solutions. Solve real-world climate problems and compete for $15,000 in non-dilutive grant prizes.

ticketTypes.name: Free Hackathon Ticket
ticketTypes.description: Standard pass including all meals, team matching, and access to mentorship.

agenda.title: Idea Pitching & Team Formations
agenda.speaker: Mentor Panel
agenda.description: Pitch your ideas and find talented team members.

faq.question: Do I need a pre-formed team?
faq.answer: No, most attendees form teams during the opening breakfast matching session.

speakers.name: Prof. S. Prasad
speakers.bio: Pioneering researcher in high-efficiency grid software and local circular solutions.
